title: Hashtag parser: extract, normalize, store in post_tags table
description:
Parse #hashtags from post text. Pattern: #[a-zA-Z][a-zA-Z0-9_]* not followed by alphanumeric. Normalize to lowercase for storage. Create post_tags junction rows (post_id, tag). Wrap hashtags in content_html with an anchor tag linking to /tags/tagname.

Test discipline:
- '#Rust' → stored as 'rust', linked as /tags/rust
- '#123' (starts with digit) → NOT parsed as hashtag
- '#rust #activitypub' in text → two separate post_tags rows
- '#rust.' with trailing period → 'rust' extracted, period ignored
- Duplicate hashtag in post → one post_tags row (not duplicates)

Defensive programming:
- Maximum 10 unique hashtags per post (prevent tag spam)
- Tag normalization must be done before DB insert to prevent case-variant duplicates
acceptance_criteria: Hashtags parsed, lowercased, stored in post_tags; trailing punctuation stripped; starts-with-digit not parsed; max 10 per post; duplicate tags are deduplicated
